task: Refactor a Python data pipeline to use multiprocessing and handle OOM errors

claude-3.5-sonnet.code:
async def process_stream(it):
    async for batch in aiostream.stream.chunks(it, 100):
        tasks = [asyncio.create_task(transform(item)) for item in batch]
        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
        await save_results([r for r in results if not isinstance(r, Exception)])

winner_reason: Claude 3.5 Sonnet provided the most robust async implementation, correctly handling exceptions within the stream.
